description: MCP tool definitions for Amazon Connect. Extend this file with custom tool specifications as the Expert Hub grows.

tools.name: search_connect_patterns
tools.description: Searches the synthesized architectural patterns and best practices for Amazon Connect.

query.description: The architecture concept to search for (e.g., 'Lex V2 routing', 'Cross-region latency')

tools.name: get_verified_iac
tools.description: Retrieves the official, idempotent Terraform modules or CloudFormation blueprints for deploying Connect resources.

tools.name: check_community_alerts
tools.description: Searches recent AWS re:Post and forum discussions for bugs or undocumented workarounds.

component.description: The Amazon Connect feature to check for community issues.
